content.problemStatement:
You are given an integer array of size NNN.

Your task is to construct its **prefix array** (also known as the **running sum array**).

The prefix array PPP is defined such that each element represents the sum of all elements from the beginning of the array up to that position:

P[i]=A1+A2+⋯+Aifor 1≤i≤NP[i] = A_1 + A_2 + \dots + A_i \quad \text{for } 1 \le i \le NP[i]=A1​+A2​+⋯+Ai​for 1≤i≤NIn other words, the ithi^{\text{th}}ith element of the prefix array stores the sum of the first iii elements of the original array.


Input Format

The first line contains a single integer NNN, the size of the array.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers.


Output Format

Print NNN space-separated integers representing the prefix array.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))

pre = [0] * n
pre[0] = arr[0]

for i in range(1, n):
    pre[i] = arr[i] + pre[i - 1]

for i in range(n):
    print(pre[i], end=" ")
